title: solanum incanum var. lichtensteinii
intro: Solanum incanum var. lichtensteinii, also known as the desert nightshade or devil's needle, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and wounds. The medicinal properties of Solanum incanum var. lichtensteinii are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
